creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
pkg-check(8) man page doesn't explain its options clearly.
In particular, it is not clear that -a option must
be combined with either -d, -s or -r.

Fix: 

Date: Mon, 16 Apr 2012 17:09:35 +0200
From: Baptiste Daroussin <bapt@FreeBSD.org>

-a is for processing all packages, it should be used with one of the possible
actions:
-d -s -r
